message:
feat(search): add maintenance coordination layer for single-flight, attach-to-progress, and fail-open decisions (ibuuh.21)

Implements the foreground coordination contract so concurrent cass actors
share one coherent truth for maintenance work. The layer reads the existing
index-run.lock metadata and heartbeat, then returns structured decisions:

- evaluate_maintenance_coordination: raw outcome (Idle/Active/Stale)
- decide_maintenance_action: actionable decision (Launch/AttachOrWait)
- decide_search_failopen: fail-open when lexical index is available
- poll_maintenance_until_idle: bounded-wait polling with timeout

Covered by 10 new unit tests (concurrent flock, mid-wait release detection,
stale heartbeat threshold, fail-open with/without lexical availability).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
